title: Download Data
content:
# Download Data

## 

You can download the data according to the time range you currently are viewing.

    This is be downloaded in a csv file format which can be opened by Google Sheets or Microsoft Excel.

To start, setup the time range of your Data Explorer viewer.

Then click on the download icon { width=20 height=20 }.

You have four options.

## Export Data

This will export all the Data Stream values for the selected Asset over the viewable time range.

## Export Recommendations

This will export all the Recommendation information for the selected Asset over the viewable time range.

## Export Control Changes

This will export all the Control Change information for the selected Asset over the viewable time range.

## Export Tags

This will export all the Data Tag information for the selected Asset over the viewable time range.
